stories.title: World Rankings — Gotterup Climbs to No. 9, Scheffler Firmly No. 1 Ahead of Open Championship

x_posts.label: Post 1
x_posts.text:
Updated world golf rankings after John Deere:

1. Scottie Scheffler
2. Rory McIlroy
3. Cameron Young
4. Justin Rose
9. Chris Gotterup (3 wins in 2026 🔥)

Scheffler leads into Royal Birkdale. The Open is 9 days away. ⛳ #GolfTwitter

article.headline: Gotterup Rockets to World No. 9 After Third Win of 2026 — Scheffler Holds Firm at No. 1 Ahead of The Open

stories.title: Scottish Open Field Preview — Stars Arrive at Renaissance Club for Final Open Tune-Up

x_posts.label: Post 2
x_posts.text:
The Genesis Scottish Open at Renaissance Club starts THURSDAY.

World No. 1 Scheffler. World No. 2 McIlroy. Gotterup (defending). The entire Open Championship field tuning up.

This is your last must-watch preview before Royal Birkdale. ⛳ #ScottishOpen #GolfTwitter

stories.title: Anthony Kim's Comeback Story — From 14-Year Absence to No. 184 in the World

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text:
Anthony Kim:

• Disappeared from golf for ~14 years
• Rejoined LIV Golf in 2026
• Won LIV Adelaide in February (overcame 5-shot deficit)
• Climbed to No. 184 in the world

One of golf's greatest comeback stories. ⛳ #GolfTwitter

article.headline: Anthony Kim's Comeback: From 14-Year Absence to No. 184 in the World — Golf's Most Remarkable Return

stories.title: LIV Golf Financial Crisis Deepens — $400M Shortfall Puts Season at Risk

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
LIV Golf update:

- PIF provided ~1/3 of promised 2026 funding
- New Orleans event postponed
- Dallas and Miami not on schedule
- CEO says season continues "at full throttle"

A $400M shortfall with 4 events left. ⛳ #LIVGolf #GolfTwitter

article.headline: LIV Golf's Financial Crisis: Can the Tour Survive the $400M Funding Shortfall?

stories.title: Amundi Evian Championship Preview — LPGA's French Major Tees Off Thursday

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
The Amundi Evian Championship — an LPGA major — starts THURSDAY in France.

Haeran Ryu is the hottest player in women's golf after winning the Women's PGA.

Five majors in women's golf. This is one of them. ⛳ #EvianChampionship #LPGATour
